_publications._publicationTitle: Gene Expression, Network Analysis, and Drug Discovery of Neurofibromatosis Type 2-Associated Vestibular Schwannomas Based on Bioinformatics Analysis.

_contextSnippet: qPCR analysis verified EGFR mRNA underexpression levels in the NF2-associated VSs tissues
details: Used for statistical analysis to verify EGFR mRNA expression differences in NF2-associated vestibular schwannoma tissues
